name: Eye of the Marksman
description: A glass ersatz eye threaded with Aetherstone and metal
effect: Replace your eye with the artifact. Your vision cannot be impaired by bright light, and your ranged attacks are never Impaired by effects that impair vision.

name: Diplomat Vest
description: A vest of durable cloth threaded with intricate and beautiful Aetherstone patterns.
effect: Counts as Light Armor (Armor +1) without taking up an inventory slot

name: Fel Spines of Power
description: A collection of short, 1-inch spines of blackened unknown metal engraved with disturbing runes
effect: Pierce all of the needles into the flesh of your arms or torso, where they permanently embed until you die. The pain they inflict grants you unnatural strength, increasing your Body score to 17 and allowing you to lift, carry or drag twice the normal capacity of someone your size. Gains Minor tag when attached.

name: Abyssal Antennae
description: A pair of feathered, 5-pointed antennae stalks wrapped in wax paper
effect: When surgically grafted to the user's forehead, the user gains the ability to detect magic, Aetherstone, Curios, and Artifacts within a Zone as if they were constantly casting the Analyze spell. Gains Minor tag when grafted.

name: Messenger Beads
description: A pair of small, bead-like metallic devices with tiny holes
effect: Two individuals can place one bead in their ears, allowing them to hear each other over long distances

name: Contingency Rig
description: A half dozen wires with circular patches connected to a thin metallic box
effect: Wear the rig under your clothes or armor, connecting the patches to vital parts of your body. When you are unwillingly rendered unconcious or otherwise debilitated, you can activate one Curio or Artifact in your inventory that you designate at the start of each day.

name: Cloak of Protection
description: A thin cloak emblazoned with the sigil of a patron god of the Pantheon
effect: While worn, the cloak surrounds the wearer in an invisible aura of divine protection, granting +1 Armor

name: Void Ink
description: A tiny, husk of an invertebrate creature, shaped like a pen
effect: Use the tip of the creature to write something in permanent Void ink. The user can write on any surface, even liquid. The markings cannot be erased.

name: Aeternal Rope
description: A 50 foot coil of impossibly light and durable rope of woven metallic fibers
effect: Cannot break or be cut, immune to all damage

name: Dictation Device
description: A speaking cone connected to a roll of paper with an intricate mechanism that holds a pen
effect: When activated, anything the user says into the cone is transcriped onto the roll of paper.

name: Heavenly Restriction
description: A small, blank paper prayer charm thrumming with divine power
effect: Inscribe the sigil of a deity and place the charm upon an item. Prevents creatures other than the owner of the charm from using that item.

name: Fleshweapon
description: A tiny, wriggling larval worm with 5 metallic tails
effect: Place the larvae on one of your arms, where it burrows into your flesh causing 1 Body loss. The metalic tails weave together under your skin, creating a 1H bladed weapon that can be extended or retracted at will. d6, 1H, Light, Concealed. When you attack with this weapon, you may take 1 Stress to secrete poison into the blade, increasing the damage to 2d8 with the Toxic tag.

name: Everburning Flame
description: A censer with beautiful motifs of The Bright Star. It burns with a brillian blue-white light.
effect: The flame of the censer sheds bright light and never extinguishes, even underwater. Creatures of Nightmare must make a Spirit save before approaching the light.

name: Ripsaw
description: An unweildy and noisy motorized circular sawblade attached to a polearm
effect: 2d10, Slow, Reach. Can also be used to cut through wood and thin metal.

name: Springclaws
description: A pair of gauntlets with hidden, spring-loaded claws
effect: Extend or retract the metal claws at will. 2d6, Light, Close.

name: Suppression Baton
description: An extendable metal baton with a tip that crackles with electricity
effect: 2d8, Close, Hefty, Stun

name: Voracity Symbiote
description: A centipede-like creature with a mouth at both ends.
effect: Functions only if swallowed whole. The creature replaces the user's digestive tract, allowing the user to gain sustenance by eating anything, even if the substance is toxic, contaminated, or otherwise indigestible.

name: Nightmare Eyes
description: A small bottle of black liquid with a dropper
effect: Place a droplet into each eye, turning the eye solid black. For the next 24 hours, the user can see in areas of darkness as if they were illuminated in bright light.

name: Lapine Slave-Collar
description: A semi-organic collar of twisted bone and dark sinew
effect: Place the collar around the neck of a creature, where it fuses with their flesh and injects tiny spines into their flesh. The user can speak a word or phrase to cause the collar to inflict intense and debilitating pain on the wearer, rendering them unable to act for 1 turn.

name: Void Offering Shrine
description: A hollow pentagonal prism 3 feet tall and 1 foot wide.
effect: Anything placed into the prism disappears forever into the Void and is effectively destroyed permanently. Offering a valuable item may result in a Void blessing such as a mutation or Curio.

name: Autocartographer
description: A thin rectangular pane of Aetherstone in a metallic frame
effect: When activated, markers for you and your companions appear on the pane and it traces your location for up to a month unless reset, creating an interactive map of your path and where you have been.

name: Scale of Incinceration
description: An opalescent five-pointed scale of some unknown creature. It is uncomfortably warm to the touch.
effect: Focusing on the scale causes it to increase in temperature. After one round, it causes all Near organic material to ignite for d6, Blast, Fire, ignoring Armor and Guard

name: Spatial Compressor
description: A 2ft long rod with 5 irregular spines extending from one end
effect: Point the rod at an inanimate object 10 to 30 inches across. The object is compressed into a 4inch sphere and attached to rod. The user can then fire the sphere at high velocity up to long range. 2d10, Slow, Far

name: Wand of Illusion
description: A glass wand that faintly shimmers, even in complete darkness
effect: Point the wand at a Near location and concentrate on an image of a creature or object. The wand creates a visual illusion of that creature or object at the location for one minute.

name: Remote Delver
description: A metallic box with a thin pane of Aetherstone for a viewscreen and a number of controls
effect: Point the device at an enclosed structure within Far range. It provides a 3D rendering of the rooms inside of the structure. The rendering can be rotated and explored via the viewscreen for up to 1 minute.

name: Wand of Domination
description: A bone wand ending in a skeletal finger
effect: Touching the fingertip of the wand to a creature to sap their Spirit with Nightmarish visions and despair, dealing d10 Spirit loss. For one day, the creature takes a Bane to any rolls made to resist coercion or manipulation.

name: Phantom Eyes
description: A circlet with 5 crystals shaped like unusual eyes
effect: When activated, 5 phantom eyes appear around the head of the wearer, allowing the wearer to see through them. The weilder gains 360 degree vision, a Boon on initiative rolls, and the eyes can be projected to a Close distance, allowing the weilder to see around corners.

name: Hazard Suit
description: A full bodysuit made from metal, rubber, and glass, with attached canisters.
effect: Protects the wearer from extreme heat, cold, toxic fumes, and radiation. Contains an internal oxygen supply that lasts up to 5 hours.

name: Voidskin
description: A five-eyed wormlike creature with a bulbous abdomen.
effect: Attach the worm to your flesh and squeeze the abdomen, causing it to expel a void-black liquid that covers the wearer's entire body and shimmers with starlight for one hour. While active, the wearer can become invisible at will. The invisibility breaks if the wearer attacks, casts a spell, or moving a large object, etc. Additionally, the wearer's unarmed attacks become d6, Close, Armor Piercing as their touch can disintegrate most materials.

name: Diving Globe
description: A spherical glass helmet with metal canisters.
effect: Donning the helmet and activating it creates an airtight seal, supplying oxygen to the wearer for up to 5 hours or until deactivated. Magitech sensors allow the wearer to perceive their surroundings at Near range, even in murky liquids, darkness, or cloudy gasses, but imposes a Bane on hearing

name: Magicbane Armor
description: Light armor decorated with reflective Aetherstone crystals
effect: +1 Armor. Any time the wearer is the target of a single-target spell or magical effect, the effect is reflected back at the caster. Roll depletion after each reflection.

name: Brainspike
description: A thin chitinous spike driven through an old skull
effect: Hammer the spike into the head of a creature. While holding the separate skull, the wielder can control the actions of the spiked creature while the creature remains in Far range. Removing the spike from a creature is fatal.

name: Cryorod
description: A foot long metal rod that is uncomfortably cold to the touch.
effect: When activated, the tip of the rod rapidly cools until it reaches absolute zero and remains at that temperature for one minute. Placing the tip in any liquid causes up to a 50ft radius of that liquid to instantly freeze, trapping the rod until the liquid melts. While active, the rod can be used as a Light weapon that deals +d12 Cold, Freezing

name: Volatility Amplifier
description: A complex brass and Aetherstone device with a pistol grip.
effect: Point at an inanimate object small enough to fit in your palm, causing it to become unstable for 1 hour. If thrown or struck while unstable, the object explodes for d8 Blast

name: Beam Spear
description: A bulky, shoulder-mounted tube shaped weapon powered by ancient Aetherstones
effect: Point the tube and activate the trigger to send a searing beam of light towards a target. Must be recharged after each use. 2d10, Far, Armor Piercing, Anti-Monster

name: Quake Generator
description: A thick tube with a steel point at one end and collapsible metallic legs
effect: When the legs are extended and the tube is placed tip down into earth or stone, the top half slams into place, sending a tremor through the ground. This process repeats for 10 minutes. If not interrupted, a violent earthquake tears through the area in a 1-mile radius, lasting for 5 minutes and collapsing all buildings made of stone, wood, or brick, caving in tunnels, and shifting the ground upwards or downwards in places permanently. Creatures in buildings or tunnels are crushed. All creatures are knocked prone for the duration. Automatically depletes after use.
